arts.ttl: Europa Conference League club set to make late transfer deadline day loan bid for Celtic striker
arts.sum: The Irish Independent reports that Shamrock Rovers are hoping to make a last-minute deadline day bid to snatch Johnny Kenny back on loan until the end of the season. Kenny made 42 appearances for Shamrock Rovers in his temporary spell at the Tallaght Stadium scoring 20 goals in total.

arts.ttl: Another Celtic striker could leave as deadline day scramble takes fresh twist
arts.sum: Johnny Kenny recently returned to Parkhead following a successful loan deal at Shamrock Rovers but could be on the move

arts.ttl: Portugal's media reacts to 'much loved' Jota's Celtic debut goal vs Motherwell
arts.sum: Celtic fans were blown away by the return of their hero but for Jota, the goal sparked incredible scenes at Motherwell the Hoops winger is unlikely to forget any time soon. “In his first game after his permanent return to the club, after a lacklustre first half of the season at Rennes in France, Jota scored and celebrated with the fans at the end of the game.”

arts.ttl: Kris Boyd admits Celtic made a brave 'move in the transfer window, deadline day prediction made
arts.sum: The deal has no option to buy as Celtic manager Brendan Rodgers looks to fill in a gap until Kieran Tierney arrives at the Hoops at the end of the season from Arsenal. “So there’s no doubt that they’ll be looking to get someone in there but the problem is because everyone knows they signed Kieran Tierney for the summer, you’re going to only get someone in on loan.”

arts.ttl: Celtic find out how much David Strelec could cost after Slovan Bratislava CEO boots out Middlesbrough bid
arts.sum: Slovan Bratislava knock back Middlesbrough offer for Celtic target Strelec Middlesbrough has had a €5m (£4.15m) booted out as Kmotrik Jr tells the English Championship club that it would take a ‘radically high’ offer to consider allowing Strelec to leave.

arts.ttl: Celtic agree deadline day loan deal, medical underway
arts.sum: Celtic have agreed a loan deal with Crystal Palace to sign versatile star Jeffrey Schlupp.

arts.ttl: Andy Halliday is put straight as he tries to pour cold water on Celtic's deal to sign Jeffrey Schlupp
arts.sum: Joseph said on X, “UPDATE: Celtic have agreed a loan deal with Crystal Palace for Jeffrey Schlupp. Jeffrey Schlupp’s Celtic medical imminent as loan deal from Crystal Palace looms

arts.ttl: Jeffrey Schlupp to Celtic transfer DONE – now striker search escalates as Brendan Rodgers tries to tool up
arts.sum: The 32-year-old will join until the summer with the Hoops paying a good chunk of his wage packet to make the deal happen

arts.ttl: Deadline day: Celtic 'pushing' to sign Crystal Palace's Jeffrey Schlupp before transfer deadline
arts.sum: Celtic are reportedly close to agreeing a loan deal for versatile Crystal Palace player Jeffrey Schlupp on transfer deadline day.
